question: what can you do
answer: Here's what I can help with: • Answer questions on science, history, technology, geography, health, philosophy, economics, culture, and more • Explain concepts at any depth — from simple overviews to technical detail • Write and debug Python scripts (file organizers, API clients, log analyzers, etc.) • Convert length and measurement units • Classify text, detect intent, and handle NLP tasks • Search the web for current information when my local knowledge isn't enough • Hold a natural multi-turn conversation with context awareness Just ask naturally — I'll do my best to help.
